ab: malavi cak takna qudasno’az muhan unapukan babalivan, madas sa qudasno’az madia’ sincuaz cia sanglav, matas’i amin itucia Bunun tu kokonun iscav bunun.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: amin na bunun asa ki babalivan ni qudasno’az, madia’ bunun mabaliv daqput cin daqputpa’ic, madia’ bunun minsuma tanam ma’un sinhanat cia sanglav.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和車輪茄很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: macial konun na sinhanat cia li’li’ cin qesing dulaz, hezang vanis hibulan maqav sinhanat tu titi’, madia’ bunun hancuman, masan tidelaz han babalivan nam.
ch: 她煮的蕨菜和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: mahanat ta qudasno’az zi kokonun na, ihan cak ngalan luluklac ci bunun, pidengun zaku luklac tu, “anak’anak ka sanglav sincuaz, ni tu cinulan iu’ tel’anak tal’ia tu sanglav, kava muhan di mabaliv!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: mahiav nam ma isbabaliv aminun mabaliv, tupa ka qudasno’az tu, “opa heza’ asu kadangaz za.”
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: minihan sinkukuza di, uqancepan cak itucia bunun ismut cin kokonun tu qanciap, musu tu uqancepan ni icia babalivan tu ineqdi’an.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: sadu ki qudasno’an malkacia itubunun kokonun tu qanciap, mastan cak matumaceqeng unaskalan.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常尊敬和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
